landing.title: ARIA - Landing
landing.heroTitle: Unify task parsing, method matching, and memory accumulation
landing.heroDesc: ARIA includes a three-layer memory system and an experience center, with a web UI for multi-step execution logs.
landing.quickStep2: 2. Configure model access: copy .env.example to .env, fill DASHSCOPE_API_KEY, then restart.
landing.quickStep3: 3. Run tasks in app; ARIA will match/learn methods and update long-term memory.
landing.cap1Desc: STM / MTM / LTM across execution and accumulation.
landing.tip: Tip: if no API key is configured, app still works in simulation mode.
landing.whyDesc: ARIA binds task execution with reusable methods. Similar tasks reuse existing methods first, then new execution results are accumulated to improve later matching.
landing.footer: Aria (Autonomous Recursive Intelligent Agent) - Flask web UI with DashScope coding models.
landing.statusNoKey: API key not configured: simulation mode available.
landing.statusHasKey: API key detected: real model calls enabled.
app.title: ARIA
app.settings.reactMode: Force ReAct: always use step-by-step Thought → Action → Observation (otherwise ARIA suggests when appropriate)
app.settings.reactModeHint: When off, ARIA recommends ReAct per task; you still confirm before the loop starts. More LLM calls when ReAct runs; cap with ARIA_REACT_MAX_STEPS in .env.
app.settings.workspaceModeHint: Single mode (ARIA) is enabled for a minimal experience.
app.workspace.subtitle: Browse local files or switch to collaboration logs
app.workspace.openFolderPrompt: Input a folder path relative to workspace root
app.workspace.previewTruncated: Preview truncated due to size limit.
app.exec.title: Execution control
app.tokenUsage.line: Token: prompt {prompt}, completion {completion}, total {total}, {calls} LLM call(s)
app.empty.chat: No messages yet. Type and send to start.
app.chat.welcomeLead: Ask in plain language — I'll break down the task, run steps, and reuse experience when it helps.
app.chat.welcomeB1: Type below, press Enter to send (Shift+Enter for a new line)
app.chat.welcomeB2: Drop files onto the input area or use the paperclip to attach
app.chat.welcomeB3: Without an API key you still get a simulated reply; open Settings to check key status
app.chat.newTaskTitle: Start a new task in this conversation (next send uses a fresh task id)
app.empty.logs: No logs yet. Send a task to view process.
app.method.pickForDetail: Select one method on the left to view details.
app.method.deleteConfirm: Delete this method? This cannot be undone.
app.session.deleteConfirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
app.actionPlan.mustClick: You must click "Confirm and Execute" below to run commands; typing "confirm" alone may not trigger execution. High-risk actions require a second click as prompted.
app.actionPlan.title: Execution Plan (Confirmation Required)
app.actionPlan.highRiskHint: High-risk actions require a second confirmation.
app.actionPlan.confirmHint: No action will run before confirmation.
app.actionPlan.doubleConfirmNeeded: Second confirmation is required for high-risk actions.
app.actionPlan.doubleConfirmBtn: High Risk: Click Again to Execute
